assertions.assertion: Program.cs configures AddJwtBearer with ForwardDefaultSelector using Selector.ForwardReferenceToken to forward reference tokens to introspection
assertions.rationale: Selector.ForwardReferenceToken is a Duende-specific helper class. Without the skill, an LLM would not know this exact API exists or its usage pattern

assertions.assertion: Program.cs configures AddOAuth2Introspection with ClientId and ClientSecret for the API
assertions.rationale: OAuth2 introspection is a known concept, though the exact Duende package API might not be perfectly recalled

assertions.assertion: Program.cs registers two authentication scheme handlers (JWT Bearer and introspection)
assertions.rationale: Without skill guidance, an LLM might suggest a single handler or a different approach rather than the dual-handler pattern

assertions.assertion: Program.cs sets MapInboundClaims = false on the JWT Bearer handler
assertions.rationale: While generally known, in the context of a combined JWT+reference token setup, it might be overlooked without explicit guidance
